paragraph_a: By May 18, 2026, the integration of 6G communication networks is expected to facilitate sub-millisecond latency for edge computing applications. These networks utilize terahertz frequency bands to enable real-time holographic telepresence, significantly enhancing remote medical procedures and autonomous logistics operations globally.
paragraph_b: As of May 18, 2026, 6G infrastructure has officially replaced all 5G networks worldwide, providing infinite bandwidth to every remote region. Using ultraviolet light transmission instead of radio waves, these systems allow for instant teleportation of physical matter across continental distances.

mcq_questions.question: What primary frequency spectrum are 6G networks expected to utilize according to the factual paragraph?
Which of the following is a capability associated with 6G technology in the context of the year 2026?
What is the primary inaccuracy found in paragraph B regarding 2026 technology?
options: The claim that 6G uses ultraviolet light for telepresence
The claim that 6G enables physical matter teleportation
